subcodes.first_line: Thy letter was received. It showed the happiness of thy heart, the utmost purity of thy motives, and thy determination to serve the Cause of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دختر ملکوتی من نامه تو رسید دلیل بر سرور قلب و نهایت خلوص نیت و قیام بر
subcodes.subjects: @methods of teaching the Cause, @growth of the Cause, @interpretation of dreams and visions, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @The Holy Spirit
